from __future__ import annotations


class ReportBuilderPositive:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.title = ""
        self.subtitle = ""
        self.author = ""
        self.region = ""
        self.currency = ""
        self.locale = ""
        self.timezone = ""
        self.theme = ""
        self.footer = ""
        self.logo_path = ""
